• Light Attacks deal 300 [PVP: 150] damage, disorient combatants, and cost 1 ammo. You can attack twice per second. Airborne attacks deal 25% reduced damage.

• Releases lightning at enemies within ? meters of you, dealing 650 [PVP: ?] damage and Jolting them
• You and allies within ? meters become Amplified

Lightning strikes (inconsistently) refund up to 50% Super Energy on Arc-Debuffed enemy Hits or Kills based on Enemy Rank:
• Tier 1 (T1) Minors: ?% on Hits | ? on Kills
• T2 Minors, T1 Elites: ?% | ?%
• T3 Minors, T2 Elites: ?% | ?%
• T4 Minors, T3 Elites, and higher: 25?% | ?%

Arc-Debuffed enemy Kills (inconsistently) grant additional Gathering Storm Super Energy:
• Minors: 1%
• Elites: 2.5%
• Players, Minibosses and higher: 4%

Inconsistencies are only(?) observed with Jolted enemies. Possibly due to killing enemies too fast after triggering Jolt's damage.
4252909580:
Passively grants 30 Magazine stat. (Identical to Extended Mag)

Kills refill the magazine while Last Guardian Standing. Does not activate when playing solo.
4255093903:
Spawns an Orb of Power upon scoring 2 Kills within ? seconds of each with a Solar Weapon.

Kills within 1 second of an activation do not count.

Spawned Orbs of Power grant 2.5%|3.25%|4.4% Super Energy with 1|2|3 Mods equipped.
4264904777:
Scoring multiple Kills with the weapon spawns a Dawning Gift for you and allies. Dawning Gifts remain on the ground for 10 seconds.

Picking up Dawning Gifts grants 10% Grenade, Melee, and Class Ability Energy, restores 22 HP, and starts Health Regeneration.

Activation progress on Kills by Enemy Rank:
• Minors and Guardians: 16.66%
• Elites, Minibosses, and Bosses: 50%

Ability energy gained may be significantly decreased based on your selected ability's Chunk Energy Scalar. Learn more about this mechanic in our explainer blog post on the Clarity website.
4267244538:
Class Ability usage while within 15 meters of an enemy grants Grenade, Melee, Class Ability, and Super Energy.

Energy Gains with 1|2|3 Mods Equipped:
• Ability Energy: 4% [PVP: 2%] | 6% [PVP: 3%] | 7% [PVP: 3.5%]
• Super Energy: 2% [PVP: 1%] | 3% [PVP: 1.5%] | 4% [PVP: 2%]

Ability energy gained may be significantly decreased based on your selected ability's Chunk Energy Scalar. Learn more about this mechanic in our explainer blog post on the Clarity website. (Super Energy gains are unaffected)
4267945040:
Weapon fires Full Auto. (Identical to the setting)

Decreases Firing Delay by 10% on Shotguns.
4274613598:
Taking any damage while Guarding increases Lunge Distance by 80% for the next swing within 🡅1.5 seconds.

Guarding while receiving Healing Effects (including healing over time from Restoration) from allies also activates the perk.

🡅 Buff Duration is increased by 0.5 seconds.
4274614370:
Taking any damage while Guarding increases Lunge Distance by 80% for the next swing within 1 second.

Guarding while receiving Healing Effects (including healing over time from Restoration) from allies also activates the perk.
4283953067:
Grants 20|40|50 Ammo Generation stat to Arc Weapons with 1|2|3 Mods equipped.

Swords receive 20|30|35 Ammo Capacity Stat instead (these values are the equivalent of having Hungry Edge, Backup Mag, or Enduring Blade equipped respectively).
4285971291: Landing 3 Precision Hits within 2.5 seconds of each refills the magazine. Pulls 2 shots from reserves and generates 1 ammo from thin air.
4285971292: Landing 3 Precision Hits within 2.5 seconds of each refills the magazine. Pulls 2 shots from reserves and generates 1 ammo from thin air.
4285971293: Landing 3 Precision Hits within 2.5 seconds of each refills the magazine. Pulls 2 shots from reserves and generates 1 ammo from thin air.
4287822553:
Grants 20|40|50 Ammo Generation stat to Strand Weapons with 1|2|3 Mods equipped.

Swords receive 20|30|35 Ammo Capacity Stat instead (these values are the equivalent of having Hungry Edge, Backup Mag, or Enduring Blade equipped respectively).

Currently bugged and does not work with Swords.
4290541820:
While the perk's buff isn't active, Weapon Kills grant 'Golden Tricorn x1' for 7 seconds, increasing weapon damage by 15%. Additional Kills refresh the buff duration to 🡅8 seconds.

While Golden Tricorn x1 or x2 is active:
Grenade or Elemental Melee Kills matching the element of the Weapon grant Golden Tricorn x2 for 10 seconds, increasing weapon damage by 50%.

Clarity tooltip editor's note: We're replacing the previous Powered Melee term with Elemental Melee. The former is now exclusively used for perks that require the consumption of a Melee Ability Charge. This note is temporary and will be removed in the future.

🡅 Golden Tricorn x1's duration is refreshed to 8 seconds.
4293542123:
Weapon Kills trigger a Solar explosion that applies 30 Scorch Stacks (40 with Ember of Ashes) and deals up to 30 damage to enemies within 4 meters of the target.

Killing Elite or higher tier Combatants and Players increases the radius to 8 meters and applies 10 more Scorch Stacks.

Scorch damage can be increased through Weapon Damage Buffs.
4294909663:
After stowing Arc Weapons:
Begins to refill 10%|10%|15% of the stowed weapon's magazine (rounded up) from reserves every 2.5|2|2 seconds with 1|2|3 Mods equipped.

Does not work with Breech-Loaded Grenades Launchers, Crossbows, and Rocket Launchers.
